video_job.actor_prompt: Cinematic wide shot in a warm, wooden Japanese fantasy RPG arcane library. Natsu Dawncrest, a masculine mage in layered blue robes with floating spell tags, and Natsu Moonvale, an androgynous ranger in a green half-cape with a leaf-shaped brooch, stand facing each other. They raise their hands in a synchronized, harmless spell practice. Soft, glowing mana ribbons begin to weave between their palms. Readable, cooperative body motion, no text, no watermarks, consistent lighting.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous shot in the arcane library. Natsu Dawncrest and Natsu Moonvale maintain their positions. Natsu Moonvale slightly adjusts their hand position, causing the soft, glowing mana ribbons to stabilize and form a steady, harmonious loop between both characters. Calm, focused teamwork. No combat, no harm, no text, no watermarks, consistent character appearance and environment throughout.
video_job.safety_notes: The interaction is strictly cooperative and non-sexual, focusing on magical synchronization and teamwork in a fantasy setting. No harmful content, text, or watermarks are present.

timeline_story.selection_reason: The relic has been contained, and the mages are performing a final synchronization of the barrier spell to ensure its long-term stability.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Professional cooperation during a delicate arcane task.
Shared success in containing the relic.
